message:
feat(codegen): implement INSERT...SELECT in VDBE and planner codegen (bd-2qtv)

Both VDBE and planner codegen paths now handle InsertSource::Select by
opening the source table for reading, scanning rows with Rewind/Next,
and inserting each into the target table via NewRowid + MakeRecord + Insert.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
